description: Just went to this resturaunt "Secret Garden" WOW !!! Best Veggie Burger I have ever had. Excellent fruit bowl. The Secret Garden drink could use a tad more Fruit and less Kale. Other then that I highly recommend this place. Next time I will be going for the Great Breakfast menu that is served till 3 pm. I got there a little late for that. The menu is Primo. Great service too. 10 out of 10

layoutDescription: Restrained luxury: large margins, small caps labels sparingly, one hero image with lots of negative space; serif display + clean sans body.
mood: Warm, appetizing, neighborhood favorite — invite hunger and comfort
antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
